text: unnamed channels are useless -- should be skipped -- there's literally no use for an agent to know this [...] Assistant: The cleanest fix is to add a helper `is_named_channel` and filter in `other_active_channel_lines`. A channel is unnamed if its name is empty or equals its own id: [...] Assistant: Clean. Unnamed channels are now filtered out of "Other active channels" before the take(5) cap, so they never appear in the awareness block.
